name: com.cupkekgames.newtonsoft
description: Newtonsoft-Json serialization layer for CupkekGames packages: SerializationManager, contract resolvers, custom converters, type providers, and a Data ↔ Newtonsoft adapter (CupkekGames.Data.Newtonsoft) so IData / DataSO instances serialize cleanly. Hard dep on com.unity.nuget.newtonsoft-json.

samples.description: Save/load demo using Newtonsoft-Json serialization with the GameSave system.
